Imagine stepping out of a pink leopard-print limo, paparazzi flashes bouncing off your vintage glam statement necklace. The bold brass knuckle charm exudes attitude, while the shimmering diamond and twinkling star catch the light, radiating pure McBling energy. Channeling the fierce, over-the-top aesthetic of Y2K icons, this piece is made for those who dare to sparkle, shine, and rule the scene with unapologetic glamour.
